work_unit: AC-F002 backport safe-stage to extracted auto-commit (audit-2026-07-03-010 derived fix)
situation: audit-2026-07-03-010 finding AC-F002 (HIGH): extracted auto-commit.py line 313 uses `git add -A` which bypasses EXCLUDED_PREFIXES filter → credential leakage risk. Live version at autonomous-studio/.claude/hooks/auto-commit.py already fixed (lines 394-412 explicit stage list). Extracted copy out-of-sync.
action: Backported safe-stage logic from live to extracted: replaced `git add -A` with explicit `git add -- <filtered changes + PROGRESS.md>`. Fail-safe: if git add fails, abort commit rather than fall back to -A. File edited in-place at /home/admin/workspace/engine-skills-extracted/自动提交/scripts/auto-commit.py.
outcome_evidence: engine-skills-extracted is a packaging artifact directory (no .git), not a git repository. opt-worktree.sh requires PROJECT to be a git repo (ensure_main_wt calls git). Fix applied to working tree but cannot be committed via standard worktree flow. Needs either: (a) init as git repo + integrate into skill distribution pipeline, or (b) apply equivalent sync check to live version's CI to prevent future drift.
next_suggestion: Next cycle: pick next pending finding (MBP-F001 HIGH gate bypass). MBP-F001~F005 all target autonomous-commit-gate.py in extracted — same non-git problem. Recommend pivoting to a structural fix: add CI/sync-check that validates extracted skills match live versions, OR convert engine-skills-extracted to a proper git-managed skill registry. Until then,派生 fixes targeting this dir will keep failing.
